---
title: "Contact"
---

## Download CV

[Download my CV](files/Jiregna_Olani_Kedida_CV.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}


# Contact

## Jiregna Olani Kedida

PhD Candidate in Biostatistics, Epidemiology & Public Health  
University of Padova, Italy

Lecturer in Statistics  
Ambo University, Ethiopia

## Email

- jiregnaolani.kedida@phd.unipd.it
- jiregna.olani@ambou.edu.et

## Research Profiles

- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-5877-7977
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jiregna-olani-kedida-45380198/
- GitHub: https://github.com/Jiregna-O-Kedida

## Collaboration

I welcome collaborations in biostatistics, clinical epidemiology, public health research, Bayesian modeling, machine learning, and artificial intelligence for health.
